title: centaurea × richteriana
intro: Centaurea × richteriana, also known as the Richter's cornflower or Giant cornflower, is a hybrid plant species derived from the cross between Centaurea cyanus and Centaurea montana, belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Centaurea × richteriana include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Centaurea × richteriana is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
